segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Did you see the new art exhibit over the weekend? Yeah. it was awesome. I was surprised that some of the sculptures seemed to really push the envelope. You mean in terms of how modern they are especially regarding social commentary? I guess there are some fairly progressive themes in the exhibit. Sounds cool. I should check it out. I think the exhibit is only up for a couple of weeks.
